chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-1719 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 07-03-2019 Mr. Zeeshan Ayoub Pathan, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Mussadque Hussain AXEN, Kotri Workshop/ respondent No.4. Mr. Javed Ali / Respondent No.6 present in person. = The appointment of petitioner as a watchman (chowkidar) in Irrigation Workshop Store Sub-Division Kotri is not disputed and he has filed this petition for release of his salaries. Mr. Mussadque Hussain AXEN has informed that petitioner was paid salaries upto October, 2015 but thereafter, he remained absent from his duty and therefore his salary was stopped. He was given various notices including a final notice to join his duties but he failed. However, before any action could be taken, he filed the instant petition. Said officer has agreed that if petitioner starts attending his duties, he would be paid salary accordingly and his previous period of absence and salaries thereof would be decided by the competent authority as per relevant rules and regulations. The petitioner and his counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of this petition in above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in above terms. Petitioner may join his duty from tomorrow and decision about his period of absence be taken within 30 days of his moving application for said purpose. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
